vocabulary.eg: The chairperson added three new items to the meeting agenda.
vocabulary.trans: 主席在會議議程中增加了三個新項目。
vocabulary.hint: 會議討論項目的清單。

vocabulary.eg: We are working hard to complete the project ahead of schedule.
vocabulary.trans: 我們正努力工作，以求在預定進度之前完成這項專案。
vocabulary.hint: 事情安排的時間順序或進度。

vocabulary.eg: The board decided to postpone the discussion until next Tuesday.
vocabulary.trans: 董事會決定將這項討論延期到下週二。
vocabulary.hint: 把事情往後挪到另一個時間。

vocabulary.eg: Ms. Lin received a beautiful gift from a colleague on her last day.
vocabulary.trans: 林小姐在上班的最後一天收到了一位同事送的漂亮禮物。
vocabulary.hint: 在同一家公司或單位工作的人。

vocabulary.eg: Please review the attached document before signing the agreement.
vocabulary.trans: 在簽署協議之前，請先審閱隨附的文件。
vocabulary.hint: 正式的書面資料或電子檔案。

vocabulary.eg: Clients must reply to this email to confirm their hotel reservations.
vocabulary.trans: 客戶必須回覆這封電子郵件以確認他們的飯店預訂。
vocabulary.hint: 確保某件事實或安排無誤。

vocabulary.eg: The office will remain closed until further notice due to renovations.
vocabulary.trans: 由於裝修，辦公室將保持關閉，直到另行通知。
vocabulary.hint: 正式傳達訊息的公告。

vocabulary.eg: All department managers are required to attend the annual conference.
vocabulary.trans: 所有部門經理都必須出席年度會議。
vocabulary.hint: 到場參加活動或會議。

vocabulary.eg: The assistant will remind the director about the upcoming press event.
vocabulary.trans: 助理會提醒主任關於即將舉行的記者會活動。
vocabulary.hint: 讓某人想起該做的事。

vocabulary.eg: If you have any questions, please feel free to contact our support team.
vocabulary.trans: 如果您有任何問題，請隨時與我們的支援團隊聯絡。
vocabulary.hint: 與某人取得聯繫。

quiz.q: The chairperson added three new items to the meeting _______.
quiz.trans: 主席在會議議程中增加了三個新項目。

quiz.q: We are working hard to complete the project ahead of _______.
quiz.trans: 我們正努力工作，以求在預定進度之前完成這項專案。

quiz.q: The board decided to _______ the discussion until next Tuesday.
quiz.trans: 董事會決定將這項討論延期到下週二。

quiz.q: Ms. Lin received a beautiful gift from a _______ on her last day.
quiz.trans: 林小姐在上班的最後一天收到了一位同事送的漂亮禮物。

quiz.q: Please review the attached _______ before signing the agreement.
quiz.trans: 在簽署協議之前，請先審閱隨附的文件。

quiz.q: Clients must reply to this email to _______ their hotel reservations.
quiz.trans: 客戶必須回覆這封電子郵件以確認他們的飯店預訂。

quiz.q: The office will remain closed until further _______ due to renovations.
quiz.trans: 由於裝修，辦公室將保持關閉，直到另行通知。

quiz.q: All department managers are required to _______ the annual conference.
quiz.trans: 所有部門經理都必須出席年度會議。

quiz.q: The assistant will _______ the director about the upcoming press event.
quiz.trans: 助理會提醒主任關於即將舉行的記者會活動。

quiz.q: If you have any questions, please feel free to _______ our support team.
quiz.trans: 如果您有任何問題，請隨時與我們的支援團隊聯絡。

vocabulary.eg: The company is trying to negotiate a new contract with the supplier.
vocabulary.trans: 公司正試圖與供應商協商一份新合約。
vocabulary.hint: 討論以達成協議。

vocabulary.eg: I would like to propose a short break before we continue the discussion.
vocabulary.trans: 我想在我們繼續討論前提議休息片刻。
vocabulary.hint: 提出一個計畫或想法供考慮。

vocabulary.eg: She gave an impressive presentation on the latest market trends.
vocabulary.trans: 她針對最新的市場趨勢做了一場令人印象深刻的簡報。
vocabulary.hint: 向聽眾展示資訊的過程。

vocabulary.eg: Effective managers know how to delegate tasks to their team members.
vocabulary.trans: 優秀的經理知道如何將任務委派給團隊成員。
vocabulary.hint: 將職責交給他人處理。

vocabulary.eg: We must work overtime to meet the deadline for the proposal.
vocabulary.trans: 我們必須加班以趕上提案的截止日期。
vocabulary.hint: 必須完成某事的最晚時間點。

vocabulary.eg: Could you please take the minutes during today's staff meeting?
vocabulary.trans: 可以請你在今天的員工會議中做會議記錄嗎？
vocabulary.hint: 會議中討論與決定事項的正式紀錄。

vocabulary.eg: The committee passed a resolution to increase the marketing budget.
vocabulary.trans: 委員會通過了增加行銷預算的決議。
vocabulary.hint: 會議中經過投票或同意後的最終決定。

vocabulary.eg: We need the director's signature on this document before we can proceed.
vocabulary.trans: 我們需要董事在文件上簽名後才能繼續進行。
vocabulary.hint: 代表身分或同意的手寫姓名。

vocabulary.eg: The board will meet tomorrow to approve the new project plan.
vocabulary.trans: 董事會將於明天開會以核准新的計畫案。
vocabulary.hint: 正式同意或接受某事物。

vocabulary.eg: Based on the feedback, we need to revise the financial report.
vocabulary.trans: 根據回饋意見，我們需要修訂財務報告。
vocabulary.hint: 為了改善或更正而改變某物。

quiz.q: The board of directors passed a _______ to expand the company's operations into Europe.
quiz.trans: 董事會通過了將公司業務拓展至歐洲的決議。

quiz.q: It is important for managers to _______ tasks to their staff to ensure productivity.
quiz.trans: 經理將任務委派給員工以確保生產力是很重要的。

quiz.q: The purchasing manager is scheduled to _______ the terms of the new agreement tomorrow morning.
quiz.trans: 採購經理預計將於明天上午協商新協議的條款。

quiz.q: The marketing director gave a very persuasive _______ about the annual budget.
quiz.trans: 行銷總監針對年度預算做了一場非常有說服力的簡報。

quiz.q: All employees must submit their reports by the Friday _______ to avoid penalties.
quiz.trans: 所有員工必須在週五的截止日期前提交報告，以免受罰。

quiz.q: Please ensure that the _______ of the meeting are distributed to all attendees by tomorrow.
quiz.trans: 請確保在明天前將會議記錄發送給所有與會者。

quiz.q: Based on the client's feedback, we need to _______ the initial architectural designs.
quiz.trans: 根據客戶的回饋意見，我們需要修改初始的建築設計。

quiz.q: The contract is not legally binding until it contains the CEO's _______.
quiz.trans: 合約在蓋有執行長的簽名之前是不具法律效力的。

quiz.q: The finance department needs to _______ the travel expenses before they can be reimbursed.
quiz.trans: 財務部需要核准差旅費用後才能予以報銷。

quiz.q: I would like to _______ a new marketing strategy to reach younger customers.
quiz.trans: 我想提議一個新的行銷策略，以接觸更年輕的客群。

vocabulary.zh: 發表、推出（新產品）；開辦（新事業）
vocabulary.eg: The technology startup plans to launch its new application next month.
vocabulary.trans: 這家科技新創公司計劃在下個月推出其新的應用程式。
vocabulary.hint: 推出新產品或服務到市場上。

vocabulary.zh: （有組織的商業或政治）活動、宣傳活動
vocabulary.eg: The marketing department is launching a new advertising campaign to attract younger customers.
vocabulary.trans: 行銷部門正在發起一項新的廣告宣傳活動，以吸引年輕一代的顧客。
vocabulary.hint: 有計畫的營銷推廣活動。

vocabulary.eg: Our current sales strategies target professionals aged 25 to 40.
vocabulary.trans: 我們目前的銷售策略以 25 至 40 歲的專業人士為目標客群。
vocabulary.hint: 針對特定的客群或市場。

vocabulary.eg: The company launched a social media event to promote its organic products.
vocabulary.trans: 公司舉辦了社群媒體活動來促銷其有機產品。
vocabulary.hint: 透過活動或廣告宣傳某物。

vocabulary.eg: We welcome customer feedback as it helps us improve our services.
vocabulary.trans: 我們歡迎客戶的回饋意見，因為這能幫助我們改進服務。
vocabulary.hint: 客戶或使用者對產品或服務的看法。

vocabulary.eg: The logistics manager is in charge of product distribution across North America.
vocabulary.trans: 物流經理負責整個北美地區的產品分銷與配送。
vocabulary.hint: 將產品運送到各個銷售點。

vocabulary.zh: 競爭激烈的、有競爭力的
vocabulary.eg: To stay competitive, we need to constantly innovate our product line.
vocabulary.trans: 為了保持競爭力，我們需要不斷創新我們的產品線。
vocabulary.hint: 能夠在市場競爭中保持優勢。

vocabulary.eg: The board of directors will discuss the long-term growth strategy tomorrow.
vocabulary.trans: 董事會明天將討論長期的成長策略。
vocabulary.hint: 達成目標的長期計畫。

vocabulary.eg: Consumer spending has increased significantly during the holiday season.
vocabulary.trans: 在節日期間，消費者支出有顯著的增長。
vocabulary.hint: 購買或使用商品和服務的人。

vocabulary.eg: Analysts will analyze the market data to predict future trends.
vocabulary.trans: 分析師將分析市場數據以預測未來的市場趨勢。
vocabulary.hint: 詳細檢視和研究某事物。

quiz.q: The technology startup plans to _______ its new application next month.
quiz.trans: 這家科技新創公司計劃在下個月推出其新的應用程式。

quiz.q: The marketing department is launching a new advertising _______ to attract younger customers.
quiz.trans: 行銷部門正在發起一項新的廣告宣傳活動，以吸引年輕一代的顧客。

quiz.q: Our current sales strategies _______ professionals aged 25 to 40.
quiz.trans: 我們目前的銷售策略以 25 至 40 歲的專業人士為目標客群。

quiz.q: The company launched a social media event to _______ its organic products.
quiz.trans: 公司舉辦了社群媒體活動來促銷其有機產品。

quiz.q: We welcome customer _______ as it helps us improve our services.
quiz.trans: 我們歡迎客戶的回饋意見，因為這能幫助我們改進服務。

quiz.q: The logistics manager is in charge of product _______ across North America.
quiz.trans: 物流經理負責整個北美地區的產品分銷與配送。

quiz.q: To stay _______, we need to constantly innovate our product line.
quiz.trans: 為了保持競爭力，我們需要不斷創新我們的產品線。

quiz.q: The board of directors will discuss the long-term growth _______ tomorrow.
quiz.trans: 董事會明天將討論長期的成長策略。

quiz.q: _______ spending has increased significantly during the holiday season.
quiz.trans: 在節日期間，消費者支出有顯著的增長。

quiz.q: Analysts will _______ the market data to predict future trends.
quiz.trans: 分析師將分析市場數據以預測未來的市場趨勢。

vocabulary.eg: The department was forced to cut its marketing budget for the next fiscal year.
vocabulary.trans: 該部門被迫削減下一個財政年度的行銷預算。
vocabulary.hint: 計畫中的財務支出安排。

vocabulary.eg: Travel expenses must be approved by the manager before they can be reimbursed.
vocabulary.trans: 差旅費用必須先經經理核准後才能申請報銷。
vocabulary.hint: 為了某事而花費的金錢。

vocabulary.zh: 收入、收益（常指公司或國家的總收入）
vocabulary.eg: The company reported a 15% increase in annual revenue.
vocabulary.trans: 該公司報告年度總營收增長了 15%。
vocabulary.hint: 公司或組織通過銷售所得到的收入。

vocabulary.eg: Our net profits have doubled since we launched the online store.
vocabulary.trans: 自從我們開設線上商店以來，我們的淨利潤已經增加了一倍。
vocabulary.hint: 收入扣除所有成本和費用後的剩餘部分。

vocabulary.eg: You should seek professional financial advice before investing a large sum of money.
vocabulary.trans: 在投資大筆資金之前，你應該尋求專業的財務建議。
vocabulary.hint: 與金錢和財務事務相關的。

vocabulary.eg: Please send the invoice to our accounting department for processing.
vocabulary.trans: 請將發票發送至我們的會計部門以進行後續處理。
vocabulary.hint: 詳細列出商品或服務費用的文件。

vocabulary.eg: The firm decided to invest millions of dollars in renewable energy research.
vocabulary.trans: 該公司決定投資數百萬美元於再生能源的研究。
vocabulary.hint: 把金錢投入某個事業或計畫以期獲得回報。

vocabulary.zh: 資金、基金；資助、提供資金
vocabulary.eg: The organization set up a special fund to support local startups.
vocabulary.trans: 該機構設立了專門的基金來支持本地的新創企業。
vocabulary.hint: 用於特定目的的資金或金錢。

vocabulary.eg: Secure encryption technology protects all online transactions from unauthorized access.
vocabulary.trans: 安全的加密技術可保護所有線上交易免受未經授權的存取。
vocabulary.hint: 兩方之間進行的買賣或交換活動。

vocabulary.eg: The government is trying to reduce the budget deficit by cutting unnecessary spending.
vocabulary.trans: 政府正試圖透過削減不必要的開支來減少預算赤字。
vocabulary.hint: 支出大於收入所導致的短差。

quiz.q: The department was forced to cut its marketing _______ for the next fiscal year.
quiz.trans: 該部門被迫削減下一個財政年度的行銷預算。

quiz.q: Travel _______ must be approved by the manager before they can be reimbursed.
quiz.trans: 差旅費用必須先經經理核准後才能申請報銷。

quiz.q: The company reported a 15% increase in annual _______.
quiz.trans: 該公司報告年度總營收增長了 15%。

quiz.q: Our net _______ have doubled since we launched the online store.
quiz.trans: 自從我們開設線上商店以來，我們的淨利潤已經增加了一倍。

quiz.q: You should seek professional _______ advice before investing a large sum of money.
quiz.trans: 在投資大筆資金之前，你應該尋求專業的財務建議。

quiz.q: Please send the _______ to our accounting department for processing.
quiz.trans: 請將發票發送至我們的會計部門以進行後續處理。

quiz.q: The firm decided to _______ millions of dollars in renewable energy research.
quiz.trans: 該公司決定投資數百萬美元於再生能源的研究。

quiz.q: The organization set up a special _______ to support local startups.
quiz.trans: 該機構設立了專門的基金來支持本地的新創企業。

quiz.q: Secure encryption technology protects all online _______ from unauthorized access.
quiz.trans: 安全的加密技術可保護所有線上交易免受未經授權的存取。

quiz.q: The government is trying to reduce the budget _______ by cutting unnecessary spending.
quiz.trans: 政府正試圖透過削減不必要的開支來減少預算赤字。
